title: German Sausage Stew
description: Hearty and flavorful German sausage stew made with tender sausages, root vegetables, and a rich broth.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion, celery, and carrots and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the potatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the German sausage and cook until browned.
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, and flour to the pot.
Whisk until the flour is dissolved and bring the stew to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
